nasb.text: The Lord looked at him and said, “Go in this your strength and deliver Israel from the hand of Midian. Have I not sent you?”

esv.text: And the Lord turned to him and said, “Go in this might of yours and save Israel from the hand of Midian; do not I send you?”

cnv.text: 耶和華轉向基甸，對他說：“你靠著你這能力，去拯救以色列人脫離米甸人的手吧；我不是差派了你嗎？”

ccb.text: 耶和华转向他，说：“你尽自己的力量去从米甸人手中拯救以色列人吧，我现在派你去。”
